title: JoQu's JJC Addon
description: Enhance your Jujutsu Kaisen experience with JoQu's JJC Addon for JujutsuCraft! Featuring advanced Limitless abilities, dynamic limb severing with RCT regrowth, an overhauled Black Flash system, and a sleek skill wheel for your sorcery fights.
body:
JoQu's JJC Addon is a gameplay expansion for Jujutsu Craft (Sorcery Fight). It introduces new combat mechanics, advanced jujutsu techniques, and a dynamic limb system to enhance your Jujutsu Kaisen experience.

🌀 Advanced Limitless
Take absolute control of space with revamped Limitless abilities:

Cursed Technique Reversal: Red
Normal: Fires an orb that pushes targets and explodes. Crouch + Partial Charge: Fires the classic Red. Crouch + Full Charge + Aim: Teleports you directly behind your target for a surprise attack.

Cursed Technique Lapse: Blue
Crouch + Full Charge: Allows for precise, free-aiming with your mouse.

Hollow Purple Nuke
A true last resort. Fully charge both Blue and Red while at critical health below 30% HP and high cursed energy over 2000 CE to unleash a devastating nuke.

Infinity Crush
Hold Shift while Infinity is active to actively crush nearby mobs. Damage and CE consumption will increase the longer you hold it.

🩸 RCT & Dynamic Limb System
Combat has permanent consequences unless you master Reverse Cursed Technique:

Limb Loss
Taking heavy damage while at low HP will result in severed limbs, crippling your combat abilities.

Regeneration
Activate RCT to regrow your lost arms and legs.

RCT Mastery
Survive 20 close calls by healing above 4 HP with RCT active while at critical health to unlock Mastery. Once mastered, reaching 0 HP gives you a 1-second window to quickly activate RCT and cheat death. Fail to activate it, and you die.

⚡ Overhauled Black Flash
Land the sparks of black with a new dynamic system:

Dynamic HUD
A live counter next to your crosshair displays your current Black Flash probability.

Combat Scaling
Your chance to land a Black Flash naturally increases the longer you stay in combat, capping at 15%, and decreases when you leave. Yuji Itadori receives a massive buff with a cap at 30%.

Black Flash Mastery
Land 500 Black Flashes, or 200 as Yuji, to unlock permanent mastery over the technique.

⚙️ Immersive Skill Wheel
A sleek, radial selection wheel makes swapping between techniques fast and intuitive. Especially vital for characters with massive arsenals like Suguru Geto, allowing for seamless Cursed Spirit summoning mid-fight.
